explanation: This command simulates the execution of the Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser task using schtasks.exe. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria by including the 'run' command and the specific task name.
This command uses single quotes instead of double quotes to enclose the task name, demonstrating a safe mutation technique (substitution). It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses additional escape characters for the backslashes in the task name, demonstrating a safe mutation technique (recoding/encoding). It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.

This command adds an optional '/i' flag, which is accepted by schtasks.exe but does not affect the core behavior of the command. It demonstrates a safe mutation technique (omission). It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
